verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I want what You want for me, dear Lord. Whatever, wherever it may be. I know that You know What's best, my Lord. I want what You want for me. I want what You want for me.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: The course may lead through stormy weather, To places near or far. And the times may bring me sunny days On close or distant shore.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I'm happy now that I am learning, yielded to Your plan, Trusting now in Your decisions, My times are in Your hands.
